title: Settings
demoUnavailable: Backup is only available on a logged-in account — demo mode doesn't save data on the server.
neverBackedUp: No backup has been made yet.
staleWarning: — you should make a new one.
fileReadError: Couldn't read the file — check that it's a valid backup JSON file.

errorCode.NO_USER: No user found. Please log in again.
errorCode.INVALID_ACCOUNT_REFERENCE: A balance correction refers to a non-existent account.
errorCode.INVALID_HABIT_REFERENCE: A habit entry refers to a non-existent habit.
errorCode.IMPORT_FAILED: Failed to restore the backup. No data was changed.

confirmEmphasis: This will replace ALL current data on the account.
confirmDescription: All current expenses, income, notes, habits, goals and other data will be permanently deleted and replaced with the contents of the uploaded file. This action cannot be undone.
